name: Superb Input Precision
description: Reworks input handling for subtick precision.

issues.info: Report bugs on the API's github issue page.

input-hz.name: Input Refresh Rate (Hz)
input-hz.description: How frequently the game checks for your input. Higher values = more responsive/precise. Set to 240 for vanilla click-on-steps behavior, 480 for CBS equivalent, or use "Instantaneous Inputs" for legacy CBF behavior.
input-hz.enable-if-description: You must disable "Instantaneous Inputs" to use this

instant-inputs.name: Instantaneous Inputs
instant-inputs.description: Whether to apply inputs immediately, overriding the input refresh rate.

dangerous-settings.name: Dangerous Settings
dangerous-settings.description: These settings change physics from vanilla and are not recommended for general use.

velocity-unrounding.name: Velocity Unrounding
velocity-unrounding.description: Implementation of the Velocity UnRounding mod, which prevents the game from rounding y-velocity to 3 decimal places.
velocity-unrounding.enable-if-description: You must enable "Dangerous Settings" to use this
